name: Derluks Yatirim Holding Anonim Sirketi
summary: Derluks Deri Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi engages in the manufacture, buying, sale, import, and export of leather garments, leather accessories, and use products for men, women, and children. The company markets its products in Asia, Europe, America, and the Far East. Derluks Deri Sanayi ve Ticaret Anonim Sirketi was founded in 2002 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
